query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.teamRole, tm.id as tm_id, tm.name as tm_name, tm.teamRole as tm_teamRole FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Corey%' OR u.role = 'super_admin' OR u.role = 'admin' LIMIT 10;
